name: Kill Chain
description: Every 10th kill by any Rifle Post triggers a free volley from all Rifle Posts simultaneously. Stacks reduce trigger count by 2.

name: Overcharge
description: Every 5th shot from a Rifle Post deals 3x damage.

name: Execute
description: Sniper Nests instantly kill enemies below 10% HP.

name: Suppress
description: Sniper hits cause enemies to move 30% slower for 2 seconds.
flavor_text: Hit them once. Keep them scared.

name: Firebomb
description: Molotov explosions leave burning ground for 2 seconds, dealing damage over time.

name: Concussive
description: Molotov explosions knock enemies back slightly.
flavor_text: The blast wave hits before the fire.

name: Tangle Field
description: Barbed Wire gains a passive slow aura affecting all enemies in range, in addition to its projectiles.
flavor_text: You don't have to touch the wire to be slowed by it.

name: Infected Wound
description: Enemies hit by Barbed Wire take damage over time while slowed.
flavor_text: The wound festers. The horde thins.

name: Frost and Fire
description: Enemies slowed by Barbed Wire that are hit by a Molotov explosion are instantly frozen for 0.5 seconds. Requires both tower types placed.

name: Blood Money
description: Brutes drop triple gold for the next 3 waves.
flavor_text: The big ones are worth more alive. Well, dead.

name: Clearcut
description: Remove 3 random obstacle tiles from the map.
flavor_text: Clear the ground. Make room to fight.

name: Overgrowth
description: 4 new obstacle tiles spawn in random open positions. Reshapes zombie routing.

name: Dead Weight
description: One random tower type is permanently removed from your card pool. Gain +30% to all cards for your highest-specialisation tower type.
flavor_text: Sacrifice the weak. Strengthen the strong.

name: Miracle Rally
flavor_text: Against all odds, they held the line.
